1. Today’s Activities
    1. 1. Download the Exercise Files
    2. 2. Review the Slides
    3. 3. Watch the Lecture Video(s)
    4. 4. Review / Study the Supplemental Materials

Today we’ll combine the ideas of loops and conditionals to meet the while loop. It will further extend our ability to do repeated tasks in Python and serve as the foundation for animation in tkinter!

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Download the Exercise Files

Exercise Files

2. Review the Slides

  1. Combining Loops and Conditionals

3. Watch the Lecture Video(s)

Link Title Type Duration
Video 1 Intro pre-recorded 8:41
Video 2 While Loop Syntax pre-recorded 2:27
Video 3 Simple While Loop in IDLE pre-recorded 6:30
Video 4 More Advanced While Loop in IDLE pre-recorded 4:18
Video 5 Intro to Animation pre-recorded 6:59

4. Review / Study the Supplemental Materials

Note: these readings / videos are suggested for additional context / examples, but not required.

  1. Severance Ch5: Iteration.
